MR022SAirQualityNASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for atmospheric monitoring. Tracks air quality parameters to ensure crew health and safety.Questionnairehttps://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/Questionnaire/mr022s-air-quality#0.5.9
overviewMedical Requirements Overview0..1group
overview.mrid-numberMRID Number and Title0..1displayInitial Value: string = MR022S Air Quality Monitoring
overview.sponsorSponsor1..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Sponsor Organizations#environmental-health "Environmental Health System"
overview.disciplineDiscipline1..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Medical Disciplines#environmental "Environmental"
overview.purposePurpose/Objectives1..1textInitial Value: string = To monitor atmospheric composition, trace contaminants, particulates, and microbial loads in spacecraft air to protect crew health.
overview.measurement-parametersMeasurement Parameters1..1stringInitial Value: string = O2, CO2, trace contaminants, particulates, microbial counts, humidity, temperature
inflight-activitiesIn-Flight Activities0..1group
inflight-activities.descriptionActivity Description0..1textInitial Value: string = Continuous atmospheric monitoring using onboard sensors. Periodic air samples collected for ground analysis.
inflight-activities.monitoring-frequencyMonitoring Frequency0..1stringInitial Value: string = Continuous for major constituents, weekly/monthly for sampling

air-quality-results.relative-humidityRelative Humidity (%)0..1decimal
air-quality-results.co-levelCarbon Monoxide (ppm)0..1decimal
air-quality-results.ammonia-levelAmmonia (ppm)0..1decimal
air-quality-results.formaldehyde-levelFormaldehyde (ppm)0..1decimal
air-quality-results.particulate-countParticulate Count (particles/m3)0..1integer
air-quality-results.fungal-countFungal Count (CFU/m3)0..1integer
air-quality-results.bacterial-countBacterial Count (CFU/m3)0..1integer
air-quality-results.meets-specificationsMeets ISS Air Quality Specifications0..1boolean
air-quality-results.corrective-actionCorrective Action Required0..1boolean
air-quality-results.notesNotes0..1text

extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MR022SAirQuality
title: MR022S Air Quality Monitoring
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for atmospheric monitoring. Tracks air quality parameters to ensure crew health and safety.
purpose: To monitor atmospheric composition and quality aboard spacecraft to ensure crew health and safety
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: To monitor atmospheric composition, trace contaminants, particulates, and microbial loads in spacecraft air to protect crew health.
O2, CO2, trace contaminants, particulates, microbial counts, humidity, temperature
Continuous atmospheric monitoring using onboard sensors. Periodic air samples collected for ground analysis.
Continuous for major constituents, weekly/monthly for sampling

code.display: Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Inhaled gas
